unit.name: WP_Http request header parsing decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that headers which are not already a PHP array should route through self::processHeaders before Requests dispatch. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, null-to-empty-array normalization, native PHP header arrays, processHeaders semantics and Set-Cookie handling, request defaults/filters, hook registration, cookie/SSL/redirect/body/max_bytes handoff, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
